by
    intro i hi
    have h₁ : continuousLinearMapOfBilin (@toBoundedBilin H (inferInstance : NormedAddCommGroup H) (inferInstance : InnerProductSpace ℂ H) (inferInstance : CompleteSpace H) a ha 1 (i.indicator 1)) = 0 := by
      have h₂ : ¬ MeasurableSet i := hi
      -- Use the fact that the set is not measurable to show that the integral is zero
      have h₃ : (i.indicator (1 : (spectrum ℂ a) → ℂ)) = 0 := by
        ext z
        by_cases hz : z ∈ i <;> simp [h₂, hz]
        <;> aesop
      simp_all [toBoundedBilin, ContinuousLinearMap.ext_iff]
      <;>
      (try simp_all [toBoundedBilin, ContinuousLinearMap.ext_iff]) <;>
      (try aesop) <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try simp_all [Complex.abs, Complex.normSq]) <;>
      (try ring_nf) <;>
      (try linarith)
    exact h₁

    intro i hi
    have h_main : continuousLinearMapOfBilin (@toBoundedBilin H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha 1 (i.indicator 1)) = 0 := by
      have h₁ : ∀ (x y : H), (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral (i.indicator (1 : (spectrum ℂ a) → ℂ)) = 0 := by
        intro x y
        have h₂ : ¬MeasurableSet i := hi
        have h₃ : ¬(i.indicator (1 : (spectrum ℂ a) → ℂ)).Measurable := by
          intro h
          have h₄ : MeasurableSet i := by
            have h₅ : MeasurableSet i := by
              have h₆ : MeasurableSet ( (i.indicator (1 : (spectrum ℂ a) → ℂ)) ⁻¹' {1} ) := h.preimage (measurable_singleton)
              have h₇ : ( (i.indicator (1 : (spectrum ℂ a) → ℂ)) ⁻¹' {1} ) = i := by
                ext z
                simp [Set.indicator]
                <;>
                  (try { aesop }) <;>
                  (try { simp_all [Set.mem_preimage] }) <;>
                  (try { aesop })
              rw [h₇] at h₆
              exact h₆
            exact h₅
          contradiction
        have h₄ : (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral (i.indicator (1 : (spectrum ℂ a) → ℂ)) = 0 := by
          rw [ComplexMeasure.integral]
          simp [h₃]
          <;>
            (try { aesop }) <;>
            (try { simp_all [Set.mem_preimage] }) <;>
            (try { aesop })
        exact h₄
      have h₂ : ∀ (x y : H), (toBoundedBilin H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha 1 (i.indicator 1)).toFun x y = 0 := by
        intro x y
        simp only [toBoundedBilin.toFun, toBoundedBilin.toFun] at *
        have h₃ := h₁ x y
        simp_all [ContinuousLinearMapOfBilin]
        <;>
          (try { aesop }) <;>
          (try { simp_all [Set.mem_preimage] }) <;>
          (try { aesop })
      have h₃ : continuousLinearMapOfBilin (@toBoundedBilin H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha 1 (i.indicator 1)) = 0 := by
        have h₄ : ∀ (x y : H), (continuousLinearMapOfBilin (@toBoundedBilin H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha 1 (i.indicator 1))).toFun x y = 0 := by
          intro x y
          have h₅ : (continuousLinearMapOfBilin (@toBoundedBilin H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha 1 (i.indicator 1))).toFun x y = (toBoundedBilin H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha 1 (i.indicator 1)).toFun x y := by
            rfl
          rw [h₅]
          exact h₂ x y
        have h₅ : continuousLinearMapOfBilin (@toBoundedBilin H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha 1 (i.indicator 1)) = 0 := by
          ext x y
          rw [show (continuousLinearMapOfBilin (@toBoundedBilin H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha 1 (i.indicator 1))).toFun x y = 0 by
              apply h₄]
          <;> simp [ContinuousLinearMap.zero_apply]
        exact h₅
      exact h₃
    exact h_main
